_meta.title: Consolidation Candidate Manifest — Gate Owner canonical
_meta.consolidation_status: FROZEN — validate-only only. consolidate_census.py --allow-db-write is NOT authorized until the user explicitly says 'consolidate approved manifest'.
_meta.scope: Chicagoland / IL watched ZIPs ONLY. Boston/MA PARKED — not touched.
_meta.no_research_attestation: Built only from evidence files already on disk. No agents, no web search, no new evidence. Rows lacking the documentary evidence their tier requires were demoted to needs_more_evidence rather than rescued with inferred/fabricated name-chain/AO/locator artifacts.

headline_definitions.consolidated: T2 single_loc_group + T3 dentist_multi + T4 stealth_dso + T5 branded_dso
headline_definitions.note: dentist_multi (T3) counts as Consolidated but NOT as DSO/PE. So the dentist_multi-vs-DSO contest only moves the DSO/PE headline, never the Consolidated headline.

canonical_rules.dso_is_structure_not_pe: A practice is DSO (T4/T5) when there is a management-company / MSO / platform STRUCTURE, or it operates under an established national/regional DSO brand. PE backing is NEITHER necessary NOR sufficient: pe_backed is a separate orthogonal boolean. A non-PE management company is still a DSO; a PE fund that merely lends to a dentist-owned group is not.
canonical_rules.locator_is_not_mso: A brand website with a /locations page (a 'locator'), a shared brand name, or a friendly-PC naming pattern is a SIGNAL, not proof of DSO structure. By itself it is equally consistent with a dentist-owned multi-location group (T3 dentist_multi). To assign T4/T5 we require documentary MSO / management-company / platform / established-DSO-brand / PE-sponsor evidence — NOT a locator alone.
canonical_rules.ao_reach_is_signal: Authorized-official reach across many ZIPs is a discovery signal, not ownership proof. A named non-clinical CEO as AO (e.g. a VP of Operations) does not by itself make the network a DSO; a named dentist-owner-AO with no MSO points to dentist_multi.
canonical_rules.consequence: Where the ONLY DSO evidence is a locator/brand name and a separate signed pass identifies a named dentist-owner with no MSO, the network is CONTESTED (route to conflicts). Where a real MSO/management-company/PE-platform/established-DSO-brand is documented, DSO tier holds even if pe_backed=false.

headline_rules.consolidated: T2 single_loc_group + T3 dentist_multi + T4 stealth_dso + T5 branded_dso
headline_rules.no_anchor: consolidation % is computed FROM the census ledger with coverage; never anchored to ADA 14.6% or the 5% detector floor.

bucket_definitions.ready_to_validate: Documentary URL or durable artifact on disk; tier+evidence satisfy consolidate_census.py validate-only; no cross-source conflict.
bucket_definitions.needs_more_evidence: Disposition uncertain OR demoted from a ready tier for lack of on-disk documentary evidence. Includes the evidence_gap_backfill_queue rows.
bucket_definitions.rejected: Out of scope / excluded class / specialist-only / QA should_NOT_consolidate.
bucket_definitions.conflicts: Cross-source equivalence-class disagreement at the same location_id (e.g. addendum=DSO vs reach5/ao_QA=dentist_multi). Gate does NOT unilaterally resolve.
bucket_definitions.duplicate_denominator_blocked: Named HIGH duplicate-door tier contradictions (shared phone/owner, different tiers). Documented denominator hazard.
bucket_definitions.taxonomy_revised: Tier changed under the corrected DSO=structure taxonomy (e.g. Dental Dreams/KOS → branded_dso; pe_backed orthogonal).
bucket_definitions.evidence_gap_backfill_queue: The needs_more_evidence subset that was demoted from a ready tier — each row carries the missing-evidence type + suggested backfill lane.

_meta.overlap_note: evidence_gap_backfill_queue == the 114 needs_more_evidence rows tagged from_ready_demotion=true. They are listed in both places by design; do not double-count.

ao_network_intelligence._provenance: ao_backfill_evidence_71_20260621.json (Main AO session). Strategic NETWORK evidence, NOT a flat validator queue. Preserved verbatim for the Consolidated/DSO headline narrative + any later per-network release.

_meta.title: Chicagoland AO-network consolidation intelligence — who is consolidating, and how we know
_meta.produced_by: Lane-1 Main — targeted AO_network evidence backfill
_meta.scope: Exactly the 71 AO_network-lane rows of consolidation_candidate_manifest_20260621.json: 13 original individual rows + 58 protected-network rows across 6 networks.

consolidation_picture.takeaway: Of the 6 AO-network clusters, 2 are genuine PE-backed branded DSOs (19 watched locations) and 4 are dentist/family-owned multi-location groups with NO MSO/PE layer (39 watched locations). AO reach correctly surfaced all 6 as consolidation candidates; documentary corroboration then split them into 'real corporate' vs 'dentist-entrepreneur multi-branding'.

rules_applied: protected_network_hold=true PRESERVED on all 58 protected rows regardless of evidence strength, until the network is EXPLICITLY released by the Gate Owner.
AO reach alone is NOT proof — each advancing row carries a real documentary URL and/or a durable non-AO artifact (name_chain, shared_ein, shared_parent, shared_website, DOL EBSA M-1).
Rows with no documentary URL and no durable non-AO artifact -> gate_status=undetermined, evidence_quality=insufficient.
pe_backed is orthogonal — set true ONLY on documentary PE; it does NOT determine tier.
No DB writes. No consolidation. IL/Chicagoland only. All verdicts ready_for_validation MAX — never 'final'.
_meta.handoff: Gate Owner merges/revalidates into the next manifest. The 58 protected rows stay protected_network_hold=true until each network is explicitly released.

cross_session_audit.description: The 13 original individual rows were investigated by TWO independent agent passes (per-assigned-batch: cicero1/cicero2/south-4/north-3, AND a comprehensive ind_south second pass over all 13). This block records where they agreed vs diverged. Conservative / primary-source verdicts were KEPT in the deliverable; the dissenting second opinion is preserved verbatim at _ao_backfill_raw_20260621/ind_south_full13_secondpass.json and per-row under individuals[].cross_session_corroboration.

networks.network_summary: All 4 locations are Illinois offices of "Dental Professionals of Illinois, P.C." (DPIL), the well-documented Heartland Dental friendly-PC used in Illinois to comply with the state's Corporate Practice of Dentistry (CPOM) prohibition. Heartland Dental is the largest DSO in the US, majority-owned by KKR since 2018. Belinda Huerta is listed as "CREDENTIALING COORDINATOR" on all 4 NPPES records — she is a Heartland Dental administrative/credentialing staff member, NOT a dentist-owner. The AO cluster is an administrative artifact of centralized Heartland NPPES credentialing, not an independent owner's multi-location footprint. All 4 locations are already classified dso_national/Heartland Dental/KKR in the project database.

networks.network_summary: Elmhurst Dental Group, Ltd. is a multi-location dental group founded in 1974 by four Elmhurst dentists, now operating 9 locations across Illinois and Wisconsin under the "Partners in Care" management umbrella (est. 1990), with Colleen Yaccino serving as non-dentist Managing Partner and CEO. Dr. Lawrence P. Groh (DDS) is Owner/President and a co-owner of Partners in Care, practicing primarily at the Elmhurst and St. Charles offices. The group uses distinct consumer-facing trade names per location (Addison Dental, St. Charles Dental, etc.) under the Elmhurst Dental Group, Ltd. legal entity. No PE backer identified — clinician co-owned with a lay CEO management layer constituting a centralized management/DSO structure. Classified branded_dso: centralized management entity (Partners in Care), non-dentist CEO, multi-location platform with distinct branded sub-practices.

networks.network_summary: Oscar Geovanni Gonzalez DDS MBA is registered as Authorized Official / Director of Operations on four NPI organization records spanning 4 Chicagoland watched-IL ZIPs. The network splits into two apparent sub-groups sharing the same AO: (1) 'All Perfect Smiles' PCs in Elmhurst (60126) and Beverly/Chicago (60643), operating as 'Perfect Smiles' consumer brand — Dr. Lena Halikias appears as president per BBB; Gonzalez holds an administrative Director of Operations title; (2) 'Prairie Dental' LLCs in Oak Park (60301) and Lisle (60532), which currently operate under the consumer brand 'Prairie Walk Dental' and are confirmed affiliated with Smile Partners USA — a PE-backed DSO/MSO (Silver Oak Services Partners since 2017, recapitalized via BlackRock/Hollyport continuation fund 2025) with 120 offices including Chicago metro. Prairie Walk Dental of Lisle books via NexHealth URL slug 'smile_partners_usa', which is documentary evidence of MSO affiliation. Oscar Gonzalez's 'Director of Operations' title (not owner/founder) across all four NPIs suggests a centralized management or credentialing-officer role under the Smile Partners USA administrative platform or a shared management entity spanning both sub-groups.

networks.network_summary: All four locations are NPPES-registered under "Dental Professionals of Illinois, P.C." — the well-documented Illinois friendly-PC wrapper used by Heartland Dental LLC to comply with Illinois corporate-practice-of-dentistry law. Each office operates under a distinct local consumer trade name (Advanced Dentistry / Essington Family Dental Care / Hickory Creek Family Dentistry / Family Dental of Orland Park), all members of the Orahh Care Dental Community brand owned by Heartland Dental LLC. The offices' own websites explicitly name "Dental Professionals of Illinois, P.C." in their legal footers and carry the Heartland/Orahh Care MSO disclosure. Lindsay Bearden serves as the NPPES Authorized Official for this PC wrapper — a corporate-officer/credentialing-admin role, not an independent dentist-owner. Heartland Dental LLC is KKR-backed (PE sponsor, 2018).

networks.network_summary: Webster Dental Care is a Chicago-area multi-location dental group founded in 1976 by Dr. Steven Rempas DDS. As of 2018-2020 it operated 11-12 locations across Chicagoland. A separate management entity — Webster Dental Management — is documented via the official website (webdentalchicago.com footer links to websterdentalmanagement.com/about/) and appears as parent_company in NPPES records for two of the four cluster locations. The organization has recruited an external CEO (Michael Errin Rios, 2020), has a formal management/MSO layer, and describes itself as "an industry leading dental service organization." No PE backing was found in any source; as of 2018 it was explicitly "owned by two dentists, without any venture capital partners." The Cicero location (ZIP 60804) is marked CLOSED on Yelp as of May 2026.

ao_network_release_decisions._policy: Protected networks are NOT auto-released on mere evidence existence. A network is release-eligible ONLY if its network-level evidence_quality=='verified'; within it, only individually ready_for_validation+verified rows are promoted. protected_network_hold remains the historical provenance flag; released rows carry an explicit gate-owner release note in `reasoning`. Held rows stay needs_more_evidence.
